message:
Simplify changelog and fix terminology

Change "crash" to "assertion failure" per reviewer feedback and
make the entry more concise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+---
+title: Fix assertion failure in replace operator when replacing with null
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+pr: 5696
+created: 2026-01-29T08:51:10.900215Z
+---
+
+The `replace` operator no longer triggers an assertion failure when using
+`with=null` on data processed by operators like `ocsf::cast`.
+
+```tql
+load_file "dns.json"
+read_json
+ocsf::cast "dns_activity"
+replace what="", with=null
+```

@@ -1,22 +0,0 @@
----
-title: Fix crash in replace operator when replacing with null
-type: bugfix
-authors:
-  - mavam
-  - claude
-pr: 5696
-created: 2026-01-29T08:51:10.900215Z
----
-
-The `replace` operator no longer crashes when using `with=null` on data that
-was processed by certain operators like `ocsf::cast`. The crash occurred because
-the operator attempted to modify read-only data when marking values as null.
-
-For example, the following pipeline previously crashed but now works correctly:
-
-```tql
-load_file "dns.json"
-read_json
-ocsf::cast "dns_activity"
-replace what="", with=null
-```
